location.description: Main headquarters of the College of Pharmacy at AASTMT, serving Alexandria and the northern region of Egypt.

establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

undergraduate.training_structure: Academic study integrated with experiential pharmaceutical training
undergraduate.degree_objective: Preparation of competent pharmacists capable of national and international competition

training_and_practice.description: Four experiential learning rotations placed in summer semesters, including applied pharmaceutical and professional practice training.

curriculum_and_education.curriculum_development: Continuously updated study plans aligned with international pharmacy education standards

facilities_and_resources: Modern educational infrastructure supporting pharmacy education

future_accreditation_direction: Alignment with American Council for Pharmacy Education (ACPE) guidelines

quality_assurance.qa_description: Five-year strategic plan (2021–2026) emphasizing continuous improvement, international benchmarking, digital transformation, and quality assurance in pharmacy education.

vision_mission.vision: To achieve excellence and international competitiveness in pharmacy education and research.
vision_mission.mission: Achieving sustainable pharmacy education through quality education, applied research, international cooperation, and strong engagement with the pharmaceutical sector.

dean.name: Prof. Amira Mostafa Senbel
dean.role: Dean of the College of Pharmacy – Abu Qir Campus
